html.description: Hyperframes HTML composition. Use class='clip' with data-start, data-duration, data-track-index attributes. Register GSAP timelines on window.__timelines (paused).

duration.description: Video duration in seconds. 0 = auto-detect from clip data-start + data-duration attributes.

scale_factor.description: Device scale factor (2 for retina-quality output)

transparent.description: Render with alpha channel (only works with vp8/vp9/prores codecs)

audio_url.description: URL to an audio file to mux into the output
